title: Middle Eastern Mujadara Samphire Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with roasted mujadara, roasted vegetables and topped with crispy samphire and a drizzle of robata oil.
instructions: Toss the samphire with a pinch of salt and roast in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the robata oil over medium heat. Add the cumin and paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook for a further minute.
Add the mujadara and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Transfer the mujadara mixture to a serving bowl and top with roasted samphire.
Drizzle with additional robata oil if desired.
